search_document:
User Request: Customer count by country.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Customer Count by Country
Type: chart
Description: Number of customers aggregated by country
Title: Customer Distribution
Type: table
Description: List of countries with corresponding customer counts
Title: Total Customer Count
Type: kpi
Description: Overall number of customers

sql_queries.title: Customer Count by Country
sql_queries.description: Number of customers aggregated by country
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY Country

sql_queries.title: Customer Distribution
sql_queries.description: List of countries with corresponding customer counts
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY Country ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Customer Count
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(CustomerID) AS TotalCustomerCount FROM Customers
